acceptance_checks.evidence: Improve trading strategy reaches HUMAN_APPROVAL_REQUIRED before handoff.
Approve creates a human approval artifact scoped to the pending chain and resumes to IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_CREATED.
Approval artifact contains chain id, approval id, approval scope, timestamp, approving actor, approval request hash, proposal hash, and approval hash.
Resume fails closed when the approval artifact is missing.
Resume fails closed when approval expiration precedes resume time.
Approval-resume replay reconstruction detects corrupted resume artifacts through hash verification.
Approval-resume runtime source does not invoke workers, dispatch workers, start execution, mutate governance, or authorize unrelated work.

validation_commands.command:
printf 'Improve trading strategy.
Approve.
exit
' | python -m aigol.cli.aigol_cli conversation --session-id SESSION-CLI-APPROVAL-RESUME-000001 --created-at 2026-06-04T00:00:00+00:00 --runtime-root /tmp/aigol_implementation_approval_resume_cli_acceptance
validation_commands.summary: CLI returned HUMAN_APPROVAL_REQUIRED, then IMPLEMENTATION_APPROVAL_RESUMED and IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_CREATED.
